query: SELECT 'activityFeed' as tbl, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM activityFeed UNION ALL SELECT 'partnerDocAudit', MAX(createdAt) FROM partnerDocAudit UNION ALL SELECT 'vendorAuditLog', MAX(performedAt) FROM vendorAuditLog;
